query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items WHERE proyecto_id = 1) AS total_items,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items WHERE proyecto_id = 1 AND pin_plano_id IS NOT NULL) AS items_with_pin,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items WHERE proyecto_id = 1 AND pin_plano_id IS NULL) AS items_without_pin,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM plano_pines WHERE plano_id IN (SELECT id FROM planos WHERE proyecto_id = 1) AND activo = 1) AS standalone_pines
